title: gentiana quinquefolia subsp. occidentalis
intro: Gentiana quinquefolia subsp. occidentalis, also known as American gentian, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the Gentiana genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of American gentian include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, it is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
